subject: [PATCH v5 09/11] mm: handle PMD swap entry faults on swap-in

2026-07-22.patch_summary: This patch adds a new function do_huge_pmd_swap_page() to handle faults on PMD (2MB) swap entries during swap-in operations. It resolves the entire mapping in one shot, mirroring the behavior of do_swap_page() for PTEs. The handler checks if the folio is already in the swap cache and allocates a new PMD-order folio if not. It also handles cases where the folio has been split or removed from the cache due to racing swap-in operations or memory failures. Additionally, it refuses to map folios containing hardware-poisoned subpages and restores soft_dirty and uffd_wp flags as needed.
